name: AIGentQuality
description: QualityInspector Agent prototype for rule-based image quality, compliance and readiness inspection. Stage 4 is dry-run only and does not call external vision models.
author: VCPToolBox Team

AIGENT_QUALITY_MIN_WIDTH.description: Minimum acceptable image width for rule-based quality checks

AIGENT_QUALITY_MIN_HEIGHT.description: Minimum acceptable image height for rule-based quality checks

AIGENT_QUALITY_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB.description: Maximum image file size before manual review is recommended

AIGENT_QUALITY_EXTERNAL_VISION.description: Reserved safety gate for future external vision-model inspection. Stage 4 keeps this false.

invocationCommands.description: Inspect a single image with rule-based file, dimension, composition and compliance checks. No external model is called.
Inspect all supported images under a directory and return average score, verdict counts and per-image reports.
Build a dry-run retry/manual-review routing plan from InspectImage or InspectBatch results. No generation workflow is invoked.
Report QualityInspector thresholds, supported extensions and external vision safety gate state.
